prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Reference DOM (Output with range): Years of experience via range input with output element display Reference DOM (Split date selects): Start date as three separate day/month/year select elements Reference DOM (Split phone inputs): Country code select and local number in separate inputs Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: split-phone, readonly-prefill, details-accordion, iframe-apply, label-wraps-deep. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Output with range; Split date selects; Split phone inputs.
